text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Again... I lost again! What am I even doing? I'm so
lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I keep goin' like this, I'm never going to be the
coolest of 'em all!
choice_data_list: You're going to win eventually! I know it!
You're going to win eventually! I know it!
Are you okay with staying lame?
Are you okay with staying lame?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I keep goin' like this, I'm never going to be the
coolest of 'em all!
choice_data_list: You're going to win eventually! I know it!
You're going to win eventually! I know it!
Are you okay with staying lame?
Are you okay with staying lame?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! How... how can you say that?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What grounds do you have to say that when I just
keep losing and losing?!
choice_data_list: I know how hard you work!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...It worked, Trainer. Thanks to you...that stupid
weak feeling is totally gone.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're always lookin' out for me and pushin' me
forward.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't sit around forever! That'd be even lamer
than losin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So it's settled! I'll get that win someday and show
everyone just how cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I haven't met my fans' expectations yet... Or
yours.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And most of all, I still haven't shown myself what
I'm really capable of!
choice_data_list: Then keep trying, however many times it takes!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right! It isn't like me to sit around
whinin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not good enough right now, then I've just
gotta keep on pushin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait, Trainer! I'm gonna make sure I show
ya how cool I can really be!
